lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣ ਗਹਿ ਰਾਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak gun geh raas har jeeo mile piaariaa |23|
lines.english: Nanak holds tight to the Treasure of Virtue, and meets with the Dear, Beloved Lord. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਵਿਧਉਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad beechaar kaal vidhausiaa |
lines.english: Reflecting on the True Word of the Shabad, death is overcome.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਕਥੇ ਅਕਥੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee kathe akath sabad savaariaa |
lines.english: Speaking the Unspoken Speech of the Lord, one is adorned with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤਿਅਹੁ ਜੰਮੇ ਖਤੇ ਕਰਨਿ ਤ ਖਤਿਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: khatiahu jame khate karan ta khatiaa vich paeh |
lines.english: Born because of the karma of their past mistakes, they make more mistakes, and fall into mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸੇ ਬਖਸੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਹਿ ਤ ਪਾਹੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhase bakhaseeeh naeh ta paahee paeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if God forgives, they are forgiven; otherwise, they are kicked and beaten. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੋਤੇ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਉਤਰਹਿ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਧੋਵਣ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhote mool na utareh je sau dhovan paeh |
lines.english: By washing, their pollution is not removed, even though they may wash hundreds of times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੁਇ ਦਰਿ ਕਪੜੇ ਪਹਿਰਹਿ ਜਾਇ ਮਨੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh due dar kaparre pahireh jaae manukh |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain are the two garments given, to be worn in the Court of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਝਖਣਾ ਦੁਖ ਛਡਿ ਮੰਗੀਅਹਿ ਸੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bolan jhakhanaa dukh chhadd mangeeeh sukh |
lines.english: O Nanak, it is absurd to ask to be spared from pain by begging for comfort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਬੋਲਣਿ ਹਾਰੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਚੰਗੀ ਚੁਪ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jithai bolan haareeai tithai changee chup |2|
lines.english: Where you are bound to lose by speaking, there, you ought to remain silent. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਭਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa dekh andar bhaaliaa |
lines.english: After looking around in the four directions, I looked within my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਝੜਿ ਭੁਲੇ ਰਾਹ ਗੁਰਿ ਵੇਖਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aujharr bhule raah gur vekhaaliaa |
lines.english: I was wandering in the wilderness, but now the Guru has shown me the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਅਲਖਿ ਸਿਰਜਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai purakh alakh siraj nihaaliaa |
lines.english: There, I saw the True, Invisible Lord Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚੇ ਵਾਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sache vaahu sach samaaliaa |
lines.english: Hail to the True, True Guru, through whom we merge in the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਰਤਨੁ ਘਰਾਹੁ ਦੀਵਾ ਬਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa ratan gharaahu deevaa baaliaa |
lines.english: I have found the jewel within the home of my own self; the lamp within has been lit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਚ ਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad salaeh sukhee sach vaaliaa |
lines.english: Those who praise the True Word of the Shabad, abide in the peace of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਹੁ ਭੁਲਾ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਬੇਤਾਲਿਆ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naavahu bhulaa jag firai betaaliaa |24|
lines.english: Having forgotten the Name, the world is roaming around like a wild demon. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਡਰਿਆ ਡਰੁ ਲਗਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਸਿ ਗਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: niddariaa ddar lag garab si gaaliaa |
lines.english: But those who do not have the Fear of God, are overtaken by fear. They are destroyed by their own pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਭੈ ਮਰੈ ਭੀ ਭਉ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai vich jamai bhai marai bhee bhau man meh hoe |
lines.english: In fear we are born, and in fear we die. Fear is always present in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ਸਹਿਲਾ ਆਇਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhai vich je marai sahilaa aaeaa soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if one dies in the fear of God, his coming into the world is blessed and approved. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਖੁਸੀ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai vin jeevai bahut bahut khuseea khusee kamaae |
lines.english: Without the fear of God, you may live very, very long, and savor the most enjoyable pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ਮੁਹਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhai vin je marai muhi kaalai utth jaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, if you die without the fear of God, you will arise and depart with a blackened face. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal taa dukh na jaaneeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, you will know no pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤ ਸਰਧਾ ਪੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal ta saradhaa pooreeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, then your desires will be fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਝੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal na kabahoon jhooreeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, you will never grieve.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal taa har rang maaneeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, you will enjoy the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਡਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal taa jam kaa ddar kehaa |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, then why should you fear death?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal taa nav nidh paaeeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, the nine treasures are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal taa sad hee sukh dehaa |
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, the body is always at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal ta sach samaaeeai |25|
lines.english: When the True Guru is merciful, you shall be absorbed in the True Lord. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੋਲਿ ਫਦੀਹਤਿ ਮੁਹਿ ਲੈਨਿ ਭੜਾਸਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਸਗਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: fol fadeehat muhi lain bharraasaa paanee dekh sagaahee |
lines.english: They spread manure, they suck in rotting smells, and they are afraid of clean water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੁ ਖੋਹਾਇ ਪੀਅਹਿ ਮਲਵਾਣੀ ਜੂਠਾ ਮੰਗਿ ਮੰਗਿ ਖਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sir khohaae peeeh malavaanee jootthaa mang mang khaahee |
lines.english: They pluck the hair out of their heads, and drink in filthy water; they beg endlessly and eat the garbage which others have thrown away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਊ ਪੀਊ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਗਵਾਇਨਿ ਟਬਰ ਰੋਵਨਿ ਧਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: maaoo peeaoo kirat gavaaein ttabar rovan dhaahee |
lines.english: They have renounced the lifestyle of their mothers and fathers, and their families and relatives cry out in distress.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਡਾ ਵਾਗੀ ਸਿਰੁ ਖੋਹਾਇਨਿ ਭਰੀਅਨਿ ਹਥ ਸੁਆਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bheddaa vaagee sir khohaaein bhareean hath suaahee |
lines.english: Their hands are smeared with ashes, and the hair on their heads is plucked out-they are like sheep!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਦੇਨਿ ਨ ਢੋਈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣ ਅੰਨੁ ਨ ਖਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath den na dtoee brahaman an na khaahee |
lines.english: The sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage give them no place of protection, and no Brahmin will eat their food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਨ ਪਤਲਿ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਨ ਦੀਵਾ ਮੁਏ ਕਿਥਾਊ ਪਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: onaa pindd na patal kiriaa na deevaa mue kithaaoo paahee |
lines.english: No one offers the rice dishes at their last rites, and no one lights the lamps for them. After their death, where will they be sent?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਕੁਚੀਲ ਰਹਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਥੈ ਟਿਕੇ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa kucheel raheh din raatee mathai ttike naahee |
lines.english: They remain polluted forever, day and night; they do not apply the ceremonial tilak mark to their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੁੰਡੀ ਪਾਇ ਬਹਨਿ ਨਿਤਿ ਮਰਣੈ ਦੜਿ ਦੀਬਾਣਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jhunddee paae behan nit maranai darr deebaan na jaahee |
lines.english: They sit together in silence, as if in mourning; they do not go to the Lord's Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਕੀ ਕਾਸੇ ਹਥੀ ਫੁੰਮਣ ਅਗੋ ਪਿਛੀ ਜਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: lakee kaase hathee funman ago pichhee jaahee |
lines.english: With their begging bowls hanging from their waists, and their fly-brushes in their hands, they walk along in single file.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਇ ਜੋਗੀ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਜੰਗਮ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਕਾਜੀ ਮੁੰਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa oe jogee naa oe jangam naa oe kaajee munlaa |
lines.english: They are not Yogis, and they are not Jangams, followers of Shiva. They are not Qazis or Mullahs.
